requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standard (MEPS) — IE2 mandatory threshold under QCVN 04:2009/BCT
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）— QCVN 04:2009/BCT 规定的 IE2 强制门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）— QCVN 04:2009/BCT 規定的 IE2 強制門檻

summary.en: QCVN 04:2009/BCT (National Technical Regulation on Energy Efficiency of Electric Motors), issued by Vietnam's Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), mandates IE2 (High Efficiency) as the minimum energy efficiency class for three-phase AC induction motors in scope (typically 0.75–375 kW, 50 Hz). Motors must carry an MOIT-issued energy label. Conformity testing must be conducted by QUATEST (Quality Assurance and Testing Centre) or another STAMEQ-accredited laboratory. A declaration of conformity and energy label certificate are required for import.
summary.zh: 越南工贸部（MOIT）发布的 QCVN 04:2009/BCT《电动机能效国家技术规范》规定，适用范围内的三相交流感应电动机（通常为 0.75–375 kW，50 Hz）的最低能效等级须达到 IE2（高效率级）。电动机须粘贴工贸部颁发的能效标签。合规性检测须由 QUATEST（质量保证与检测中心）或其他经 STAMEQ 认可的实验室执行。进口须提供符合性声明和能效标签证书。
summary.zht: 越南工貿部（MOIT）發布的 QCVN 04:2009/BCT《電動機能效國家技術規範》規定，適用範圍內的三相交流感應電動機（通常為 0.75–375 kW，50 Hz）的最低能效等級須達到 IE2（高效率級）。電動機須粘貼工貿部頒發的能效標籤。合規性檢測須由 QUATEST（質量保證與檢測中心）或其他經 STAMEQ 認可的實驗室執行。進口須提供符合性聲明和能效標籤證書。

standards_or_laws: QCVN 04:2009/BCT (Vietnam National Technical Regulation on Energy Efficiency of Electric Motors)

summary.en: China's mandatory national standard GB 18613-2020 (effective 2021-06-01) requires IE3 (Grade 3) as the legal minimum for most three-phase induction motors, which exceeds Vietnam's current IE2 mandatory floor. Both China and Vietnam operate on 380/220 V, 50 Hz three-phase grids, so there is no voltage or frequency mismatch for standard motor specifications. Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) exceed Vietnam's current MEPS requirement by one efficiency class.
summary.zh: 中国强制性国家标准 GB 18613-2020（自 2021 年 6 月 1 日起生效）要求大多数三相感应电动机最低达到 IE3（3级），高于越南当前的 IE2 强制门槛。中国和越南均使用 380/220 V、50 Hz 三相电网，标准电动机规格下无电压或频率差异。满足 GB 18613-2020 3 级（IE3）的中国电动机在效率等级上比越南当前 MEPS 要求高一个等级。
summary.zht: 中國強制性國家標準 GB 18613-2020（自 2021 年 6 月 1 日起生效）要求大多數三相感應電動機最低達到 IE3（3級），高於越南當前的 IE2 強制門檻。中國和越南均使用 380/220 V、50 Hz 三相電網，標準電動機規格下無電壓或頻率差異。滿足 GB 18613-2020 3 級（IE3）的中國電動機在效率等級上比越南當前 MEPS 要求高一個等級。

gap.en: Vietnam mandates IE2 while China mandates IE3; Chinese motors exceed Vietnam's efficiency floor. However, Chinese certification (GB 18613-2020, CCC) is not recognised in Vietnam for market access. Motors must be separately tested by QUATEST or a STAMEQ-accredited lab against QCVN 04:2009/BCT, and an MOIT energy label must be obtained. The 50 Hz grid alignment eliminates voltage/frequency adaptation gaps.
gap.zh: 越南强制要求 IE2，中国强制要求 IE3；中国电动机超过越南能效门槛。但中国认证（GB 18613-2020、CCC）在越南不被认可用于市场准入。电动机须由 QUATEST 或经 STAMEQ 认可的实验室另行按 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 进行检测，并须取得工贸部能效标签。50 Hz 电网一致消除了电压/频率适配差距。
gap.zht: 越南強制要求 IE2，中國強制要求 IE3；中國電動機超過越南能效門檻。但中國認證（GB 18613-2020、CCC）在越南不被認可用於市場准入。電動機須由 QUATEST 或經 STAMEQ 認可的實驗室另行按 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 進行檢測，並須取得工貿部能效標籤。50 Hz 電網一致消除了電壓/頻率適配差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QCVN 04:2009/BCT enforced by MOIT; IE2 minimum; energy label and QUATEST conformity certificate required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard; IE3 minimum enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 IE3 exceed Vietnam's current IE2 mandatory floor, but separate QUATEST testing and MOIT energy label certification are required for Vietnam import. Chinese domestic certification is not a substitute for Vietnam conformity procedures. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合 GB 18613-2020 IE3 的中国电动机超过越南当前 IE2 强制门槛，但越南进口仍须另行取得 QUATEST 测试认证和工贸部能效标签。中国国内认证不能替代越南合规程序。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合 GB 18613-2020 IE3 的中國電動機超過越南當前 IE2 強制門檻，但越南進口仍須另行取得 QUATEST 測試認證和工貿部能效標籤。中國國內認證不能替代越南合規程序。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label Certificate — MOIT mandatory energy labelling for import
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签证书 — 工贸部强制进口能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤證書 — 工貿部強制進口能效標籤

summary.en: Vietnam requires mandatory energy labels (nhan hieu tiet kiem nang luong) for electric motors under MOIT Circular 36/2016/TT-BCT and subsequent amendments, implementing the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy. Motors in scope of QCVN 04:2009/BCT must carry an MOIT energy label before import and market placement. The energy label must be obtained from MOIT or its designated body; application typically requires submission of QUATEST (or accredited lab) test results demonstrating the motor's IE efficiency class. The label discloses the efficiency class and is affixed to the motor nameplate area.
summary.zh: 越南根据工贸部第 36/2016/TT-BCT 号通知及后续修订（落实《节约和高效使用能源法》），要求电动机粘贴强制能效标签（nhan hieu tiet kiem nang luong）。QCVN 04:2009/BCT 适用范围内的电动机在进口和市场销售前须取得工贸部能效标签。能效标签须向工贸部或其指定机构申请，申请通常须提交 QUATEST（或经认可实验室）证明电动机 IE 效率等级的测试结果。标签标注效率等级并粘贴于电动机铭牌区域。
summary.zht: 越南根據工貿部第 36/2016/TT-BCT 號通知及後續修訂（落實《節約和高效使用能源法》），要求電動機粘貼強制能效標籤（nhan hieu tiet kiem nang luong）。QCVN 04:2009/BCT 適用範圍內的電動機在進口和市場銷售前須取得工貿部能效標籤。能效標籤須向工貿部或其指定機構申請，申請通常須提交 QUATEST（或經認可實驗室）證明電動機 IE 效率等級的測試結果。標籤標注效率等級並粘貼於電動機銘牌區域。

standards_or_laws: MOIT Circular 36/2016/TT-BCT on mandatory energy labelling
Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (Vietnam)

summary.en: China has its own mandatory energy efficiency label (能效标识) administered by SAMR under the Energy Efficiency Label Management Regulations. Motors covered by GB 18613-2020 must carry the China energy efficiency label. However, China's domestic energy label is not accepted by Vietnam MOIT as a substitute for Vietnam's mandatory energy label. Both are market-specific labels requiring separate applications and are not mutually recognised.
summary.zh: 中国实行由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）根据《能效标识管理办法》管理的强制能效标识（能效标识）制度。GB 18613-2020 适用范围内的电动机须粘贴中国能效标识。但中国国内能效标识不被越南工贸部接受为越南强制能效标签的替代。两者均为特定市场标签，须分别申请，互不认可。
summary.zht: 中國實行由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）根據《能效標識管理辦法》管理的強制能效標識（能效標識）制度。GB 18613-2020 適用範圍內的電動機須粘貼中國能效標識。但中國國內能效標識不被越南工貿部接受為越南強制能效標籤的替代。兩者均為特定市場標籤，須分別申請，互不認可。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Efficiency Label Management Regulations (能效标识管理办法)

gap.en: China's domestic energy efficiency label (能效标识) is not recognised in Vietnam. A separate Vietnam MOIT energy label must be obtained for each motor model/range, supported by QUATEST or accredited-lab test results. This is a procedural and cost gap even where the motor's efficiency performance exceeds Vietnam's IE2 floor. Importers must budget for Vietnam-specific testing and labelling lead time before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国国内能效标识在越南不被认可。每款电动机型号/系列均须另行取得越南工贸部能效标签，并须提供 QUATEST 或经认可实验室的测试结果。即使电动机效率性能超过越南 IE2 门槛，这仍构成程序和成本差距。进口商须在出货前为越南专项测试和标签周期预留时间和成本。
gap.zht: 中國國內能效標識在越南不被認可。每款電動機型號/系列均須另行取得越南工貿部能效標籤，並須提供 QUATEST 或經認可實驗室的測試結果。即使電動機效率性能超過越南 IE2 門檻，這仍構成程序和成本差距。進口商須在出貨前為越南專項測試和標籤周期預留時間和成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MOIT energy label required for import and market placement of in-scope motors
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China energy efficiency label (能效标识) required domestically; not transferable to Vietnam

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China's domestic energy label is not a substitute for Vietnam MOIT energy label. Exporters must obtain a separate Vietnam energy label through QUATEST testing for each motor model before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内能效标识不能替代越南工贸部能效标签。出口商须在出货前为每款电动机型号通过 QUATEST 检测单独取得越南能效标签。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內能效標識不能替代越南工貿部能效標籤。出口商須在出貨前為每款電動機型號通過 QUATEST 檢測單獨取得越南能效標籤。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: QUATEST Conformity Testing and Declaration of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: QUATEST 合规检测与符合性声明
requirement_topic.zht: QUATEST 合規檢測與符合性聲明

summary.en: Motors imported into Vietnam under QCVN 04:2009/BCT must undergo conformity testing at QUATEST (Quality Assurance and Testing Centre under STAMEQ/Ministry of Science and Technology) or another STAMEQ-accredited laboratory. The importer must submit a declaration of conformity (cong bo hop quy) to MOIT or the relevant authority, together with the QUATEST test report and energy label certificate, before customs clearance. QUATEST has three regional centres (Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, Da Nang). Testing fees and lead times apply per motor series.
summary.zh: 根据 QCVN 04:2009/BCT，进口至越南的电动机须在 QUATEST（隶属 STAMEQ/科技部的质量保证与检测中心）或其他经 STAMEQ 认可的实验室进行合规性检测。进口商须向工贸部或相关主管部门提交符合性声明（cong bo hop quy），连同 QUATEST 测试报告和能效标签证书，方可办理海关清关。QUATEST 在胡志明市、河内和岘港设有三个区域中心。每个电动机系列均涉及检测费用和交期。
summary.zht: 根據 QCVN 04:2009/BCT，進口至越南的電動機須在 QUATEST（隸屬 STAMEQ/科技部的質量保證與檢測中心）或其他經 STAMEQ 認可的實驗室進行合規性檢測。進口商須向工貿部或相關主管部門提交符合性聲明（cong bo hop quy），連同 QUATEST 測試報告和能效標籤證書，方可辦理海關清關。QUATEST 在胡志明市、河內和峴港設有三個區域中心。每個電動機系列均涉及檢測費用和交期。

summary.en: China's conformity system for motors involves CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA for motors within CCC scope (<1 kV, within the CCC catalogue), and GB 18613-2020 compliance enforcement by SAMR. CCC certification involves testing by a CNCA-designated lab and factory audit. Neither CCC nor SAMR enforcement actions are recognised by Vietnam authorities as substitutes for QUATEST conformity testing under QCVN 04:2009/BCT.
summary.zh: 中国电动机合规体系涉及由认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的 CCC（中国强制认证）（适用于 CCC 目录范围内的 1kV 以下电动机），以及市场监督管理总局（SAMR）对 GB 18613-2020 的合规执行。CCC 认证涉及 CNCA 指定实验室检测和工厂审核。CCC 认证和 SAMR 执法均不被越南主管部门认可为 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下 QUATEST 合规检测的替代。
summary.zht: 中國電動機合規體系涉及由認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的 CCC（中國強制認證）（適用於 CCC 目錄範圍內的 1kV 以下電動機），以及市場監督管理總局（SAMR）對 GB 18613-2020 的合規執行。CCC 認證涉及 CNCA 指定實驗室檢測和工廠審核。CCC 認證和 SAMR 執法均不被越南主管部門認可為 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下 QUATEST 合規檢測的替代。

gap.en: Chinese CCC certification and GB 18613-2020 compliance records are not accepted in Vietnam as substitutes for QUATEST conformity testing under QCVN 04:2009/BCT. Separate QUATEST testing, declaration of conformity submission to MOIT, and energy label application are all required for Vietnam import. This creates additional lead time (typically weeks) and cost for each motor model exported to Vietnam.
gap.zh: 中国 CCC 认证和 GB 18613-2020 合规记录不被越南接受为 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下 QUATEST 合规检测的替代。越南进口须另行进行 QUATEST 检测、向工贸部提交符合性声明，并申请能效标签。每款出口越南的电动机型号均需额外承担数周的交期和相应成本。
gap.zht: 中國 CCC 認證和 GB 18613-2020 合規記錄不被越南接受為 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下 QUATEST 合規檢測的替代。越南進口須另行進行 QUATEST 檢測、向工貿部提交符合性聲明，並申請能效標籤。每款出口越南的電動機型號均需額外承擔數週的交期和相應成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QUATEST or STAMEQ-accredited lab testing + declaration of conformity to MOIT required for Vietnam import
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for motors in scope; SAMR enforces GB 18613-2020; neither substitutes for Vietnam requirements

source.publisher: QUATEST 1 (Quality Assurance and Testing Centre 1), Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC and GB 18613-2020 certifications do not substitute for Vietnam QUATEST conformity testing and MOIT declaration of conformity. Exporters must engage QUATEST or a STAMEQ-accredited lab for each motor model series before Vietnam customs clearance. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国 CCC 认证和 GB 18613-2020 认证不能替代越南 QUATEST 合规检测和向工贸部提交的符合性声明。出口商须在越南海关清关前为每款电动机型号系列委托 QUATEST 或经 STAMEQ 认可的实验室进行检测。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國 CCC 認證和 GB 18613-2020 認證不能替代越南 QUATEST 合規檢測和向工貿部提交的符合性聲明。出口商須在越南海關清關前為每款電動機型號系列委託 QUATEST 或經 STAMEQ 認可的實驗室進行檢測。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
